params.name: Cavendish's Scale
params.source: Fragment Crafting (1.6%), Lottery Machine (0.03%), Relic Forge (80 Relic RF), Wishing (0.14%)
params.description:
On Jun 20, 1789, Cavendish used a torsion balance to measure the gravitational constant.

Cavendish placed a high-density iron ball and a low-density iron ball at both ends of the torsion scale. In the middle of the scale, a tough wire was tied to the stand and a small mirror. A laser beam was fired to the mirror and reflected to somewhere in a distance. The location of the laser point was then recorded. Two iron balls of the same density were placed near each of the balls on the scale. The scal …
